brand.name: Harleys Fine Baking ODOO DEV
brand.subtitle: Internal Testing Environment
brand.description: This portal provides secure access to the Harleys Fine Baking ODOO DEV testing environment. Only authorized users should access this system.

infoCards.title: Testing Environment
infoCards.description: This instance is intended for testing new features, validating workflows, and user acceptance testing.

infoCards.title: Availability
infoCards.description: Service availability depends on the development server. Temporary maintenance may occur during deployments.

infoCards.title: Support
infoCards.description: Contact the ODOO DEV development team if you experience issues accessing the application.

recentUpdates.title: Employee Attribution guides expanded with per-model change & deletion logging
recentUpdates.description: The Employee Attribution documentation now covers opt-in deeper logging for individual models — including deletions — with a full admin configuration walkthrough for IT.

recentUpdates.title: Shared Login & Employee Attribution guides published
recentUpdates.description: Added a plain-language User Guide and a technical Developer Guide covering shared functional accounts and automatic message attribution, with a Documentation home to pick the right one.
